title: Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Ana
id: b4539133-aacd-5b3f-a125-d371ecd3c277
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: PRIVESC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/02
modified: 2026/07/02
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_token:
        EventID:
            - 4672
            - 4673
        PrivilegeList|contains:
            - 'SeDebugPrivilege'
            - 'SeImpersonatePrivilege'
            - 'SeTcbPrivilege'
    selection_newservice:
        EventID: 4697
        ServiceName|contains: 'PSEXE'
    condition: selection_token or selection_newservice
falsepositives:
    - System administrators performing maintenance
    - Legitimate service installations
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-02T07:27:40Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Critical Flaws Double as Elevation of Privilege Dominates the Cyber Threats  Analysis of Microsoft Vulnerabilities Report 2026 Exploitation Attempt - PRIVESC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4050498; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-02, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
